qa_pairs.question: Why is it not possible to install R packages in batch or interactive jobs on cluster compute nodes?
qa_pairs.answer: Installing R packages in batch or interactive jobs is not possible because the compute nodes on most clusters do not have access to the Internet.

qa_pairs.question: What is the recommended practice before installing R packages that are developed using GNU compilers?
qa_pairs.answer: Before attempting to install any R packages developed using the GNU family of compilers, it is recommended to load a `gcc` module.

qa_pairs.question: When installing multiple R packages, should the same version of the `gcc` module be used?
qa_pairs.answer: Yes, it is recommended to use the same version of the `gcc` module for all R packages that you install.
